personal_info.name: Md. Shifat Bin Reza
personal_info.title: QA Engineer
personal_info.summary: QA Engineer specializing in end-to-end test automation and API validation, with expertise in Playwright, Selenium, Pytest, and Postman/Newman. Experienced in designing modular test frameworks, executing full SDLC/STLC processes, and reporting defects in Agile/Scrum environments. Committed to shipping stable, well-tested software through both rigorous manual testing and data-driven automation.

responsibilities: Designed and executed 50+ manual test cases covering smoke, sanity, and regression testing for web platforms; identified and reported 10+ critical bugs pre-release, preventing production defects and maintaining product stability.
Tested and validated 30+ REST API endpoints using Postman, verifying authentication flows, data accuracy, and response reliability to ensure seamless backend-frontend integration.
Participated in Sprint planning sessions, documented defects in Jira, and supported efficient defect resolution within the Agile development team, adhering to full SDLC and STLC processes.

projects.title: OrangeHRM UI Automation
highlights: Developed a scalable UI automation framework using Playwright and TypeScript, implementing the Page Object Model (POM) to reduce code duplication by 35% and improve script maintainability.
Optimized test execution time by 50% by implementing a global authentication strategy that reuses login states, eliminating redundant login steps across multiple test suites.
Integrated faker-js to generate dynamic, unique test data for complex form submissions, increasing test reliability and reducing data-related failures by 20%.
Configured parallel test execution and automated HTML reporting, reducing total test duration from minutes to seconds across 100+ critical validation scenarios.

projects.title: API Automation Framework
highlights: Built a modular REST API test automation framework using Python and Pytest, covering full CRUD operations, JWT authentication, and dynamic filtering with a 97.7% test case pass rate.
Implemented a layered architecture separating API wrappers, test logic, and utilities — improving maintainability and scalability across the test suite.
Integrated Faker library for dynamic test data generation and Pytest fixtures for session-based JWT token management, ensuring reliable and repeatable test execution.
Automated HTML report generation using pytest-html with detailed request/response logs, enabling clear failure diagnostics and test execution visibility for stakeholders.

projects.title: API Testing (Postman)
highlights: Tested 23 RESTful API endpoints for a student management system, validating functionality, data integrity, business rule compliance, and error handling across all scenarios.
Automated API test workflows using Postman scripts, reducing manual test execution effort and enabling repeatable regression runs.
Implemented schema validation for request and response payloads, detecting structural inconsistencies and enforcing data consistency standards early in the test cycle.
Generated detailed HTML reports using Newman CLI, providing clear test result tracking and enabling stakeholder-ready regression analysis documentation.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering

topics: Manual Testing: Comprehensive coverage of SDLC, STLC, and bug reporting methodologies.
API Testing: Validation of RESTful services using Postman, Newman, and schema integrity checks.
Automation Testing: Building robust frameworks with Playwright and Pytest for end-to-end validation.
Performance Testing: Analyzing system stability and response times under load using JMeter.
Real-World Projects: Hands-on experience applying SQA principles to complex web applications.

awards: Achieved a 40% scholarship for 9 consecutive semesters in recognition of academic excellence at the university.
certifications: English Proficiency Test (Upper Intermediate: CEFR B2), Duolingo [ 2025 ]
